description: Runs a cheap representative UI degradation canary set for unavailable/malformed IPFS metadata, platform API, personalization services, and indexer empty/lagging/failing states.

data.label: UI operations/degradation canaries
command: IPFS metadata|normalizes network failures|malformed|falls back to the curated collection|no channels match filters|displays empty message when no projects are returned|displays error message when API call fails|hides loading spinner after error
